'''gangubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibbler|nibbler]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibbler|nibbler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gangubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gængibith|gængibith]] || [[word:gængibij|gængibij]] || [[word:gængibish|gængibish]] || [[word:gængibi|gængibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gangungubuth|gangungubuth]] || [[word:gangungubuj|gangungubuj]] || [[word:gangungubush|gangungubush]] || [[word:gangungubu|gangungubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gangubuth|gangubuth]] || [[word:gangubuj|gangubuj]] || [[word:gangubush|gangubush]] || [[word:gangubu|gangubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gangufbuth|gangufbuth]] || [[word:gangufbuj|gangufbuj]] || [[word:gangufbush|gangufbush]] || [[word:gangufbuf|gangufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gangubuthu|gangubuthu]] || [[word:gangubuju|gangubuju]] || [[word:gangubushu|gangubushu]] || [[word:gangubuku|gangubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gangubuth|gangubuth]] || [[word:gangubuj|gangubuj]] || [[word:gangubush|gangubush]] || [[word:gangubu|gangubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gangubuthul|gangubuthul]] || [[word:gangubujul|gangubujul]] || [[word:gangubushul|gangubushul]] || [[word:gangubukul|gangubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gangubuthuthu|gangubuthuthu]] || [[word:gangubujuju|gangubujuju]] || [[word:gangubushushu|gangubushushu]] || [[word:gangubuku|gangubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gangubuthun|gangubuthun]] || [[word:gangubujun|gangubujun]] || [[word:gangubushun|gangubushun]] || [[word:gangubukun|gangubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gangubuthuoro|gangubuthuoro]] || [[word:gangubujuoro|gangubujuoro]] || [[word:gangubushuoro|gangubushuoro]] || [[word:gangubukuoro|gangubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
